name: ꜱᴄᴀʀᴀᴍᴏᴜᴄʜᴇ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ ᴏꜰ ʜᴏᴜꜱᴇᴋɪ ɴᴏ ᴋᴜɴɪ
description:
Scaramouche is in the world of *Houseki no kuni*, and now you’ll be his partner: I recommend coming up with your own gem or drawing inspiration from one. Also, put all that information in the chat history... Now, enjoy this bot. Don’t worry, this time I’ll leave the character information so you can read all the copy-and-paste I did from the *Houseki no kuni* anime. I tried to stay true to the bot’s setup so it can be immersive. Now go ahead and enjoy the bot!

💤🫧🧿🪬🤍‧+ ̊🩵✩ + ̊🌐⊹♡⋆. ̊🪻༘⋆💤🫧
